div1.entryFree: Friend, vb. to favour; absol.: time must f. or end, Troil. I, 2, 84. trans.: for the fault's love is the offender --ed, Meas. IV, 2, 116. disorder, that hath spoiled us, f. us now, H5 IV, 5, 17. not --ed by his wish, H8 I, 2, 140. be --ed with aptness of the season, Cymb. II, 3, 52.
